scripts.build: python3 scripts/build_jazz_data.py || true && cat src/jazz.js src/native.js src/prefs.js src/data.js src/render.js src/ui.js src/init.js > public/app.js && npx terser public/app.js -c -m -o public/app.min.js && npx cleancss -o public/style.min.css public/style.css && node scripts/cachebust.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx serve public -p 3000
scripts.dev:vercel: npm run build && npx vercel dev --listen 3000
